description_long: This range hood features a prominent rectangular chimney in a metallic gray finish, rising vertically from a wide, angular black canopy. The canopy is sleek and slightly slanted, with sharp, clean edges and a glossy surface that reflects light. The chimney section appears to be constructed from stainless steel, segmented into several stacked sections, and is designed to conceal the ductwork. The front of the canopy is broad and flat, likely housing the main air intake and possibly a control panel. Vents are visible at the top of the chimney, suggesting upward air exhaust. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens or commercial spaces.
description: A modern range hood with a glossy black angular canopy and a tall, segmented metallic chimney. The design is sleek, with visible vents at the top and a broad, flat front.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, glossy black canopy and the tall, rectangular metallic chimney rising from its center.
description_view_1: Side-angled view reveals the slanted shape of the canopy and the vent openings at the top of the chimney.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back of the chimney and the rectangular base of the canopy, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view again shows the slanted canopy and vented chimney top, mirroring view 1.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are located at the top of the chimney, oriented upward.
